thesis_hint: Recent 3-cycle quality is declining (0.5323 -> 0.5323 -> 0.1117), so stop exploration and return to the best-performing live family. Use VVV funding snapback v11 as the base: PF 1.101, DD 8.4%, 216 trades, strong ranging PF 1.22 and acceptable transitional PF 1.03, but trending PF remains the bottleneck at 0.95. Test one lever per variant only: stricter pre-entry trend veto, shorter hold time when snapback stalls, or regime-aware size haircut during weak-trend conditions.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.15 and max_drawdown_pct <= 8.5; abort any variant with total_trades < 180, ranging profit_factor < 1.20, transitional profit_factor < 1.00, or trending profit_factor <= 0.95.
